column1: A Tornado Warning has been issued for our area. Stay tuned for further updates on your ABC Action News Station.
We just had a sighting of a tornado here in Alachua County. Weather getting very rough outside!
what are you watching for our area? Are you watching live? Everything I am finding is south of us.
I'm following the FB page for Alachua County, Alachua County Emergency Management, and Meteorologist Bradley Benoit (local WCJB meteorologist).
where. At?
They are saying the area of Orange Heights, Melrose. Meteorologist Bradley Benoit said there were other possible tornado sightings in Bradford and Union County.

Prayers for everyone , from Pompano Beach
We were lucky this time!

Thanks, Denis, for including other parts of the state, not just Tampa. Lots of us look to you even though we're in other areas. I'm on the east coast in Martin County, but I'm worried about my daughter in Tallahassee.
praying for your daughter God got his arms rapped around her. Blocking any danger that comes to her. Pray and trust in God
I'm in Pensacola,guess I miss this one.
Over here in Brevard had trailers in an RV Park at 520 & I95 blown over.
It was scary wind just west of srq airport… now it’s calm
Winds are blowing it does remind me of wacky storms we have.., but it’s lasting with rain for hours. Blessed not a hurricane.

So people understand its for your safety even if nothing happens, I lived in Alabama and right behind my place was Sand Mountain and the tornado went past my place but hit up the mountain from my house total devastation it was horrible to see, they call it tornado alley SO CALM DOWN
